description: This task requires you to perform a complete requirements allocation workflow in ReqView. Create a new component named 'Security Audit Module' in the ARCH (Architecture Design) document and a new requirement in the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document with the text: 'The system shall generate a timestamped audit log entry for every successful or failed user authentication attempt.' Establish a traceability link from the SRS requirement to the 'Security Audit Module' in the ARCH document to show allocation and save the project.
